# Button

Triggers an action or submits a form.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/button
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview slug="button" example={0} code={`<Button>Save</Button>`} />

```tsx
<Button>Save</Button>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="button" example={1} code={`<Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>`} />

```tsx
<Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
```

<ComponentPreview slug="button" example={2} code={`<Button loading>Saving</Button>`} />

```tsx
<Button loading>Saving</Button>
```

## Props

| Prop           | Type            | Required | Default | Description |
| -------------- | --------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `leadingIcon`  | `ReactNode`     | No       | -       | -           |
| `loading`      | `boolean`       | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`         | `ButtonSize`    | No       | -       | -           |
| `trailingIcon` | `ReactNode`     | No       | -       | -           |
| `variant`      | `ButtonVariant` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant   | Values                                |
| --------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `variant` | `solid`, `outline`, `ghost`, `subtle` |
| `size`    | `sm`, `md`, `lg`                      |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/button.json`
- Recipe: `button`
- Files: `src/components/ui/button.tsx`
